creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Simeon Simeonov from comment #0)
Do you have any *.go files in /usr/ports/www/grafana9/work/grafana-9.3.1/vendor/github.com/cortexproject/cortex/pkg/util after the extract?

I have:
root@boris:/tmp/ports/usr/ports/www/grafana9/work/grafana-9.3.1/vendor/github.com/cortexproject/cortex/pkg/util# ll
total 112
